snippet.title: Ada Bommale - Video Song | Vaazha 2 | Rzee | Ankit Menon | Vipin Das | Savin Sa | Hashir
snippet.description:
Here's the Video Song of "Ada Bomale" from "Vaazha 2", Lyrics Written by Heykaarthiii, Music Composed and Sung by RZee.

Song Credits:

Music Composed, Written, Produced and Arranged by RZee
Vocals: RZee
Lyrics: Heykaarthiii
Kids Vocals: Chinmayi Kiran Lal, Minya Panicker and Nila Raj
Recording Engineer (Kids): Akshay Kakkoth
Mixed & Mastered: Vishnu Raj M R

Movie Credits:

Director : Savin SA
Writer : Vipin Das 
Producers : Vipin Das, Harris Desom, Sahu Garapati, P.B Anish, Adarsh Narayan, Icon Studios 
DOP : Akhil Lailasuran
Editor : Kannan Mohan 
Music Supervision : Ankit Menon 
Background Score : A TEAM 
Songs Composers : Malayali Monkeys, Rajat Prakash (Hatsmyth) , Parvatish Pradeep, Rzee, Muthu, Arcado, Jazir Muhammed, Ashwin Aryan & Electronic Kili
Sound Design : Arun S Mani 
Sound Mixing : Vishnu Sujathan 
Production Design : Babu Pillai 
Costumes : Aswathy Jayakumar 
Makeup : Sudhi Surendran 
Action Directors : Kalai Kingson , G.Vicky Nandagopal 
Executive Producer : Kanishka Gopishetty 
Production Controller : Rinny Divakar 
Production Executive : Aneesh Nandipulam
Finance Controller : Kiran Nettayam

Colourist : Joyner Thomas 
DI – Sapthaa Vision

Design : Yellowtooths

snippet.title: VARAVU - Teaser | Joju George | Arjun Ashokan | Shaji Kailas | Olga Productions
snippet.description:
Presenting the official teaser of Varavu, featuring Joju George, Arjun Ashokan, Saniya Iyappan, Murali Gopi, Baiju Santhosh, Baburaj, Vani Vishwanath, and more. The film is produced by Naisy Reji under the banner of Olga Productions, directed by Shaji Kailas, with music composed by Sam CS.

Film Details:
Directed by : Shaji Kailas
Banner : Olga Productions
Produced by : Naisy Reji
Starring : Joju George, Arjun Ashokan, Murali Gopi, Baiju Santhosh, Baburaj, Vani Vishwanath
Music & Background score : Sam CS
Dialogues : A K Sajan
DOP : S Saravanan
Editor : Shameer Muhammed
Stunts : Stunt Silva, Kalai Kingson, Phoenix Prabu, Rajashekar Master, Thavasi Raj, Mafia Sasi, Jackie Johnson
Executive Producer : Jomy Joseph, Rahul Reji Thomas
Head of Production : Ron Issac Thomas
Production Controller : Vinod Mangalath
Chief Associate : Syamanthak Pradeep
Audiography : Rajakrishnan MR
Sound Design: Rajakrishnan MR
Costume : Sameera Saneesh
Makeup: Saji Kattakada
Lyricist : Vinayak Sasikumar, Harinarayanan, Santhosh varma
Still photography : Hari Thirumala
Choreography : Rekha Master 
VFX : Pictorial FX, Dotvfxstudios
Colourist : Liju Prabhakar
PRO : Manju Gopinath, Hains
Media Communication : Aparna Girish 
Title Design : Yellothooths
Publicity Designs : Yellowtooths, Rocket Science
Marketing & Visual Promotions : Snakeplant LLP

snippet.title: Dheema Video Song (Tamil) | Love Insurance Kompany | Pradeep Ranganathan | Anirudh | Vignesh Shivan
snippet.description:
Song Title : Dheema
Movie : Love Insurance Kompany
Language : Tamil
Composed by Anirudh Ravichander
Lyrics - Vignesh Shivan
Vocals - Anirudh Ravichander

Composed, Arranged & Programmed by Anirudh Ravichander
Acoustic Guitar, Ukulele  - Keba Jeremiah
Flute - Lalit Talluri
Acoustic & Dobro Guitar, Mandolin - Amalraj
Solo Violin by Amalraj
Additional Keyboard Programmed by Arish
Music Advisor - Ananthakrrishnan
Creative Consultant - Sajith Satya

Recorded at Albuquerque Records, Chennai. Engineered by Srinivasan M, Shivakiran S
Strings 7 Studio, Chennai, Engineered by Amal Raj
Mixed by Vinay Sridhar & Srinivasan M at Albuquerque Records, Chennai

Music Coordinator - Velavan B

Creative Consultant - Sajith Satya

Thambi’s Audio Box,Hyderabad. Engineered by Srinath Komanduri
Mixed by Vinay Sridhar & Srinivasan M at Albuquerque Records, Chennai, 
Assisted by Plural

snippet.title: INSIDIOUS: OUT OF THE FURTHER - Official Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
The Further comes for our world. 
Watch the official trailer for #Insidious: Out Of The Further - exclusively in theatres this August.


Follow us on social: 
https://www.instagram.com/InsidiousMovie   
https://twitter.com/InsidiousMovie  
https://www.facebook.com/InsidiousMovie  

Visit our site: https://insidious.movie 
Subscribe for more exclusive content: https://www.youtube.com/sonypictures 

Having earned over $740 million at the global box office, the Insidious franchise returns with a new family and a terror that redefines what The Further is capable of.
 
In Insidious: Out of the Further, Amelia Eve stars as Gemma, a young mother raising her daughter in the house she grew up in who discovers she can travel into The Further, the purgatorial realm of lost souls at the heart of the Insidious universe. When something evil comes after her, Gemma discovers an ability that changes everything: she doesn’t just enter The Further, she can bring what lives there back to the real world. Once the demons realize her power, our world becomes their playground.
 
With Lin Shaye reprising her iconic role as Elise Rainier and Jacob Chase (Come Play) directing, Insidious: Out of the Further opens August 21, 2026. Screenplay by Jacob Chase. Story by David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick and Jacob Chase.

snippet.title: Battleground S2 - Official Trailer | Shikhar Dhawan, Khesari Lal, Fukra Insaan, Priyanka, Rahul
snippet.description:
Amazon MX Player presents
Battleground Season 2 - Official Trailer

Starring: Shikhar Dhawan, Fukra Insaan (Abhishek Malhan), Khesarilal Yadav, Priyanka Chahar Choudhary, Rahul Chaudhari
Production House: Rusk Studios
Produced By: Rusk Media
Directed By: Monisha Jaisingh Vaid
Genre: Reality Show, Unscripted

@ThumsUpOfficial presents Battleground Season 2
Activewear Partner: @performaxactivewear 
Comfort Partner: @damensch7036 
Special Partner: @eekenlife3425 
Sunscreen Partner: @fixderma.skincare 
Associate Partner: Sheth Brothers

@shikhardhawan5942 @KhesariMusicWorld  @priyaankachaharchoudhary @FukraInsaan 

About Show: Battleground is here to find India’s next fitness superstar, with cricket icon Shikhar Dhawan as the Super Selector. Over 5 weeks, 4 teams, and 1 house, 16 contestants will face off in intense physical challenges, earning ‘Credits’ for themselves and their teams. Only 1 male and 1 female contestant will be crowned as the ultimate fitness champions. Leading the teams are dynamic personalities: Abhishek Malhan, Khesarilal Yadav, Priyanka Chahar Choudhary and Rahul Chaudhari bringing energy and strategy to the game. The contestants will live and train in a Bootcamp-style house, where their mental resilience, endurance, and teamwork will be tested every day. With daily episodes showcasing highlights, challenges, and behind-the-scenes moments, viewers will witness the drama, determination, and grit of each participant. As they push themselves to their limits, only the strongest will make it to the top. Who will become India’s next fitness superstar? Tune in to find out!

About Amazon MX Player - 
Amazon MX Player is India’s leading free, premium, ad-supported entertainment platform, offering the biggest collection of web series, movies, reality shows, and international content — all available to stream FREE. From blockbuster originals to trending new launches, Amazon MX Player brings you some of India’s most loved shows like Ek Badnaam Aashram, Bhaukaal, Dharavi Bank, Indori Ishq, Roohaniyat, Chidiya Udd, Hunter, Hey Prabhu!, Battleground, Bindiya Ke Bahubali, Pyar Ka Professor and many more across thriller, romance, comedy, action, and drama genres for all ages. Love international dramas? Explore MX Vdesi, featuring top global hits dubbed in Hindi, Tamil, and Telugu—including audience favourites like Love O2O, My Girlfriend Is An Alien S2, GenZ, Our Secret, Sweet Sweet, My Eyes Are Full of You, Heirs and more. Whether you’re into binge-worthy thrillers, emotional love stories, laugh-out-loud comedies, or viral international dramas — there’s always something new to watch on Amazon MX Player.

Lyrics
F - सुघर शरीर के सजावट बलम देखी शरीर के बनावट बलम
रउआ ला प्यार बाटे सोरह आना रति भर नइखे मिलावट बलम

M - काहे हमारा के अइसे तु देखेलू धन कनखी से 
गोरे गाली प लेवेद चुम्मा सनम तनकी से 
F - दिने में गुड नाइट क देब 
महंग इनभाईट क देब 
M - चलला प दहिने बावे हिलेला ए जान
की हे..
कमर पर करिया सड़िया खिलेला ए जान.....

M - हवे सूती से ए धनी ज्यादा स्वाद सटने में 
काला साड़ी के कहबू त 
क देब दुकान हम पटने में 
F - पहिर लेनी काटन बलम जी 
करी ना उद्घाटन बलम जी 
M आशु प्रियांशु कुर्ती सिलेला ए जान 
की हे..
कमर पर करिया सड़िया खिलेला ए जान.....

 म्यूजिक – IVY MUSIC

snippet.title: GODZILLA MINUS ZERO | First Look Teaser
snippet.description:
GODZILLA MINUS ZERO
VFX, Written, and Directed by Takashi Yamazaki
In theatres November 6
Follow @godzilla_toho and @GKIDSfilms for more updates!
godzillaminuszero.com

GODZILLA MINUS ZERO picks up in 1949, two years after the tumultuous events of Godzilla Minus One, and continues the story of the Shikishima family as they face an all-new calamity. Additionally confirmed out of CinemaCon, Ryunosuke Kamiki, the hero who faced Godzilla’s terror in Godzilla Minus One, returns as Koichi Shikishima, and is joined by Minami Hamabe as Noriko Oishi, who miraculously survived Godzilla’s first attack on Tokyo.

As a project Filmed For IMAX, GODZILLA MINUS ZERO was shot with high-definition digital cameras certified by IMAX, and optimized in sound and imagery unique to IMAX screens. Fans can look forward to seeing Godzilla presented to all new terrifying heights, making GODZILLA MINUS ZERO in a true cinematic event not to be missed.

Godzilla Store: https://godzilla.com/collections/all

For more information regarding Godzilla, check out our other channels:

Godzilla News: 
https://godzilla.com/blogs/news 

Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/godzilla_toho/

snippet.title: Phool Pishi O Edward | Official Teaser | Nandita Roy & Shiboprosad Mukherjee | Sohini | Raima
snippet.description:
অদৃশ্য তালে, গোপন ছন্দে—
কে নাচছে…
আর নাচাচ্ছেই বা কে?

নন্দিতা রায় ও শিবপ্রসাদ মুখোপাধ্যায় পরিচালিত, উইনডোজ প্রযোজিত  
রহস্য-রোমাঞ্চে ভরপুর ‘ফুল পিসি ও এডওয়ার্ড’
আসছে বড় পর্দায় এই মে মাসে।

Credits:
Presented by Nandita Roy and Shiboprosad Mukherjee
Produced by Windows
Directed by Nandita Roy and Shiboprosad Mukherjee
Story, Screenplay and Dialogues: Zinia Sen
Additional Screenplay & Dialogues, Script Correction: Samragnee Bandyopadhyay
D.O.P : Animesh Ghorui
Music & Background Score : Joy Sarkar
Lyrics: Srijato
Editor : Malay Laha
Production Design : Mridul Baidya & Saswati Karmakar

Sound Design and Mix : Dipankar Chaki & Tirthankar Majumdar
DI Colourist : Prosenjit Banerjee
Costume Designer : Anupam Chatterjee
Dance Mentor : Sushmita Banerjee


Cast:
Sohini Sengupta
Raima sen
Arjun Chakraborty
Ananya Chatterjee
Shyamoupti Mudly 
Koneenica Bandyopadhyay
Anamika Saha
Shahebb Chattopadhyay
Rajatava Datta
Debesh Chattopadhyay 
Soumya Mukherjee
Rishav Basu

নন্দিতা রায় ও শিবপ্রসাদ মুখোপাধ্যায় পরিচালিত, উইনডোজ প্রযোজিত  
রহস্য-রোমাঞ্চে ভরপুর ‘ফুল পিসি ও এডওয়ার্ড’
আসছে বড় পর্দায় এই মে মাসে।

Presented by Nandita Roy and Shiboprosad Mukherjee
Produced by Windows

Story, Screenplay and Dialogues: Zinia Sen

Lyrics: Srijato
Editor : Malay Laha
Production Design : Mridul Baidya & Saswati Karmakar

Sound Design and Mix : Dipankar Chaki & Tirthankar Majumdar
DI Colourist : Prosenjit Banerjee

snippet.description:

♪Song - Deewane Bheem Naam Ke 
♪Singer- Mangal Mahi 9369210016

Support:

And Team of Jaunpur

            #Ranjeet saroj 
            #Arpit Vishwakarma
            #Jay kumar 
            #Sunny sda 
            #Rishi sda 
            #Shubham  Kumar 
            #Ashish Kumar 
♪Music Publisher - V Magic Digital
♪Digital Partner - V Magic Digital
♪Music Distribution Partner: Flimo Media
♪Visit : https://flimomedia.com
♪Graphic - Sonu Kumar
♪Music Label - Tathagat Music
♪Contact Us - 9935372028

♪Thanks For Watching Our  Channel.
♪Have A Nice Day ...
♪ Subscribe For More Updates

आप सभी देशवासियों को मैं विकास यादव अपने यूट्यूब चैनल Tathagat Music (तथागत म्यूजिक) 
की तरफ से आप सभी का हृदय की गहराइयों से हार्दिक स्वागत वंदन अभिनंदन करता हूं ।
जो भी गीत आपके बीच में भेजा हूं आपने हमें अपना प्यार आशीर्वाद ज़रूर देते हैं और
आशा करता हूं कि इसी तरह देते रहेंगे।

इस गीत मे एक एक शब्द बहुत प्रिय है आप इसे पूरा सुनें 🙏🙏

यह गीत आपको कैसा लगा कमेंट में जरूर बताएं और अगर आप हमारे चैनल पर नए हैं तो कृपया चैनल को सब्सक्राइब कर ले ताकि हमारे सभी गीत आपके मोबाइल स्क्रीन पर सबसे पहले पहुंचे!
एक बार फिर आप सभी श्रोताओं को आप सभी दोस्तों को आप सभी साथियों को हार्दिक आभार......

 इस तरह से हमेशा हम अपनी आवाज के माध्यम से समाज में व्याप्त बुराइयों को दूर करने हेतू नये नये गीत बनाते रहते हैं।
आप को अगर गाने पसंद आए तो हमारा सहयोग जरूर करें

snippet.title: Jinugo Male Official Video Song ❤️ | Dhanush Gowda, Spandana Somanna | Akash Unnikrishnan |PRK Audio
snippet.description:
Unicorn Entertainment in association with PRK Audio proudly presents
Jinugo Male | ಜಿನುಗೊ ಮಳೆ - A Musical Journey
In a quiet rural village, a carefree boy’s life changes when a new teacher arrives at the local school.
The moment he sees her step off the morning bus, he falls in love at first sight.

ಜಿನುಗೊ ಮಳೆ ವಿಡಿಯೋ ಸಾಂಗ್ ಈಗ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಮುಂದೆ...
Presenting the Official music video of Jinugo Male - In a quiet village, a loud heart found its love...

Welcome to our Tamil Devotional Channel, your ultimate destination for soulful and uplifting Tamil devotional songs. Dive into the divine with our carefully curated collections designed to inspire and bring peace to your soul every day of the week.

Daily Devotional Songs:
* Monday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Tuesday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Wednesday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Thursday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Friday Tamil Devotional Songs

Special Devotional Collections:
* Shiva Tamil Devotional Songs: Celebrate the power and grace of Lord Shiva.
* Vishnu Tamil Devotional Songs: Immerse in the blessings of Lord Vishnu.
* Muruga Tamil Devotional Songs: Invoke the valor and blessings of Lord Muruga.
* Hanuman Tamil Devotional Songs: Feel the strength and devotion of Lord Hanuman.
* Amman Tamil Devotional Songs: Honor the divine mother in her various forms.
* Saibaba Tamil Devotional Songs: Seek the blessings of Shirdi Sai Baba.
* Balaji Tamil Devotional Songs: Worship Lord Venkateswara with these soulful songs.
* Lakshmi Tamil Devotional Songs: Attract prosperity with hymns for Goddess Lakshmi.
* Devi Tamil Devotional Songs: Praise the supreme goddess Devi in her many avatars.
* Ganesh Tamil Devotional Songs: Start your day with prayers to Lord Ganesha.

Special Occasions and Deities:
* Amavasai Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs for the new moon day rituals.
* Pradosham Tamil Devotional Songs: Hymns for the auspicious Pradosham period.
* Ashta Lakshmi Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs dedicated to the eight forms of Goddess Lakshmi.
* Vinayagar Tamil Devotional Songs: Devotions for the remover of obstacles, Lord Vinayagar.
* Ganapathi Tamil Devotional Songs: Invoke blessings from Lord Ganapathi.
* Surya Tamil Devotional Songs: Worship the Sun God, Surya, with these melodies.
* Sani Tamil Devotional Songs: Appease Lord Sani with these devotional tracks.
* Guru Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs to honor Guru and seek his wisdom.
* Perumal Tamil Devotional Songs: Devote to Lord Perumal with these spiritual songs.
* Navagraha Tamil Devotional Songs: Balance your energies with songs for the nine planets.

Subscribe now and join our spiritual journey. Like, share, and hit the bell icon to stay updated with our latest devotional uploads. May these divine songs bring peace, prosperity, and positivity to your life.

మీకు నచ్చితే లైక్ చేయండి, కామెంట్ చేయండి మరియు షేర్ చేయండి. దయచేసి సబ్‌స్క్రైబ్ చేయడం మర్చిపోవద్దు. చూసినందుకు చాలా ధన్యవాదాలు. నోటిఫికేషన్ల కోసం 🔔 నొక్కండి.

snippet.title: Passenger | Official Trailer (2026 Movie) – André Øvredal, Jacob Scipio, Lou Llobell
snippet.description:
130 million people take road trips every year. 15,400 of them are never seen again. Watch the Official Trailer for #PassengerMovie – Only in theatres May 22

A few weeks into their van life adventure, a young couple witnesses a horrific accident that leaves the driver dead. Soon they’re being pursued by a demonic stalker who’s impossible to outrun and follows them wherever they go.

snippet.title: Marvel Is Hiding The REAL Villain of Spider-Man: Brand New Day! | SuperSuper
snippet.description:
Marvel’s Spider-Man: Brand New Day trailer has dropped, but the biggest mystery is still unsolved… who is the REAL villain?

Everyone thinks Sadie Sink is playing Jean Grey, but what if that’s exactly what Marvel wants you to believe? In this video, we break down hidden clues from the trailer, comic connections, and shocking hints that point toward a completely unknown villain — The Queen (Adriana Soria).

From mind control powers to Spider-Man’s terrifying transformation, this theory might change everything you think about Brand New Day and even the future of the MCU, including X-Men and Doomsday setup.

#SpiderManBrandNewDay #MarvelTheory #MCU

snippet.title: O Soniya - Video Lyrical | Dino M, Bipasha | Ishq Hai Tumse | Udit N, Alka Y | Himesh Reshammiya
snippet.description:
Relive the magic of early 2000s romance with O Soniya from Ishq Hai Tumse! Featuring the charming duo Dino Morea and Bipasha Basu, this melodious track is beautifully sung by Udit Narayan and Alka Yagnik, with music composed by Himesh Reshammiya.

#osoniya #ishqhaitumse #uditnarayan #alkayagnik #himeshreshammiya #sameer #bollywoodsongs #oldhindisongs #romantichindisongs #bollywoodlovesongs

Composer - Himesh Reshammiya

Music Label - Sony Music Entertainment India Pvt. Ltd.

snippet.title: भतार लेके अलगा सखी (4K) #Srishti Bharti | Ft. Anuradha | Bhatar Leke Alaga Sakhi | New Bhojpuri Song
snippet.description:
Subscribe करने के लिए क्लिक करें 👉 - http://goo.gl/ip2lbk

आप सब इस गाने का Reels बनाए - Make Your Reels :- https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/1641954687118616/

►Song - Bhatar Leke Alaga Sakhi
►Singer - Srishti Bharti
►Featuring - Anuradha Yadav
►Lyrics - Dinesh Railhan
►Music Director - Railhan Studios, Prakash Soni
►Video Director - Govind Prajapati
►Editor - Karan Rudra
►Company/ Label - Wave Music 
►Digital Marketing - Lokdhun 
►Whatsapp - 9718776677
►VG - 45218

♪ Spotify : https://open.spotify.com/track/4xGmb58mFeFaijv1ZeDe3W?si=3956e07da3894e6e
♪ Gaana :  https://gaana.com/song/bhatar-leke-alaga-sakhi
♪ Jio Saavn :  https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/bhatar-leke-alaga-sakhi/Aj4RBx8Cflg
♪ Apple Music :  https://music.apple.com/us/album/bhatar-leke-alaga-sakhi-single/1891803262
♪ Amazon Prime Music :  https://music.amazon.com/tracks/B0GWK5SNG5?marketplaceId=ATVPDKIKX0DER&musicTerritory=US&ref=dm_sh_0B1FTNqBZzw7mIFMWhfOxM61w
♪ YouTube Music :  https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=5Y_faQB6ScY&si=HprGiB6iLwZN2tyl
♪ Instagram Reels :  https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/1641954687118616/
♪ Spotify Playlist : https://open.spotify.com/user/31wrrqxq4vi7pg57rnkxcna4tcqu?si=eed3103487f24692

Connected with us !

👉 Follow us on Instagram :- https://www.instagram.com/wavemusic/
👉 Like us on Facebook :- https://www.facebook.com/WaveMusicIndiaofficial
👉Join Us on Whtsapp :- https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VacuoR1GpLHNjsDWYd2R
👉 Follow us on X ( Twitter ) :- https://x.com/WaveMusicWM?t=kKhpZOhFiLqswaThplIGBg&s=08

Lyrics - 

रोजे रोजे झगड़ा से बानी परेशान 
गलता शरीरिया हो बिना खान पान 
सुने के रोजाना मिले ताना रे सखी 
जिनगी में चैन मोर बा ना रे सखी 
सास ससुर भसुर केकरो बात नहीं सहब 
भत्तार लेके अलगा सखी पटना में रहब 

अंतरा 1st 👇 
ना चैन मिलेला ना करार मिलेला 
सासु ननदी के गारी बार बार मिलेला 
देवरों के रहन दुश्मन लागेला
मरचाइ खानी बोली छने छन लागेला
पिया जी के संग में घूमब पटना के मॉल में 
नया नया फिलिम देखब जाई के हॉल में
नईहर में माई से सारा बतिया कहब 
भत्तार लेके अलगा सखी पटना में रहब

अंतरा 2nd 👇 
ना सहात बाटे हो ना रहात बाटे हो 
दुख वाला सृष्टि के बात बाटे हो
सांचों आपन मन के बदलिए देहब 
ससुरार छोड़ी अब हम चलिए देहब 
रहे ना देहब आपन बाउर हालाते 
हमहू कमाईब जाके पिया जी के साथे 
आईब ना लौटी कबो भले ओनिए सड़ब
भत्तार लेके अलगा सखी पटना में रहब

Lyrics - 

रोजे रोजे झगड़ा से बानी परेशान 
गलता शरीरिया हो बिना खान पान 
सुने के रोजाना मिले ताना रे सखी 
जिनगी में चैन मोर बा ना रे सखी 
सास ससुर भसुर केकरो बात नहीं सहब 
भत्तार लेके अलगा सखी पटना में रहब 

अंतरा 1st 👇 
ना चैन मिलेला ना करार मिलेला 
सासु ननदी के गारी बार बार मिलेला 
देवरों के रहन दुश्मन लागेला
मरचाइ खानी बोली छने छन लागेला
पिया जी के संग में घूमब पटना के मॉल में 
नया नया फिलिम देखब जाई के हॉल में
नईहर में माई से सारा बतिया कहब 
भत्तार लेके अलगा सखी पटना में रहब

अंतरा 2nd 👇 
ना सहात बाटे हो ना रहात बाटे हो 
दुख वाला सृष्टि के बात बाटे हो
सांचों आपन मन के बदलिए देहब 
ससुरार छोड़ी अब हम चलिए देहब 
रहे ना देहब आपन बाउर हालाते 
हमहू कमाईब जाके पिया जी के साथे 
आईब ना लौटी कबो भले ओनिए सड़ब
भत्तार लेके अलगा सखी पटना में रहब

snippet.description:
Run Down The City – Monica in stunning 8K is a vibrant, upbeat track bursting with pure high-energy fun.

Credits: 
Jio Studios Presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR

Music Directors: Shashwat Sachdev, R.D. Burman
Singers: Reble, Shashwat Sachdev, Asha Bhosle, R.D. Burman
Lyricists: Reble, Majrooh Sultanpuri

Lyrics:
Pyaase pyaase in mere labo ke liye
Wanna get down for the night he a demon
I just wanna feel, wanna love, wanna breathe it
Tere hotho ne hazaar waade kiye
Well is it true that your love is a blessing, 
I just wanna feel, wanna love, wanna breathe it
Bhoolne waale koi jiye to kaise jiye
Living it all out I got no religion

Are haa
Is it on now 
are haa

haa
Lalalalalalalalala
Monica o my darling 
Monica o my darling 
You ain’t seen a bad girl on the street,
Living it up we in a run down city 
You ain’t never met a bad girl like me
Living it up, head on a gun, so pretty 
Could you fall in love with a girl like me?
My baby tough he got a red machete 
You ain’t never met a bad girl like me, 
Living it up, head on a gun, so pretty 
Oh God, oh god, oh god 
When it all goes down 
I’m gone, oh god, oh god, can you hold me down?
Cuz you got my love to take, you don’t give but you want it all
Oh god, oh god, oh god can you hold me down 
Piyaa tu ab to aa jaa
He so gangster 
Run down the city
Shola sa man daheke aa ke bujhaa jaa
Cold romancer 
He's my Da vinci
Tan ki jwaala thandi ho jaay
Aise gale lagaa jaa
He so candour,
I'm his devotee
Aise gale lagaa jaa
He so gangster

He's my Da vinci

I'm his devotee
Baby just come down and get me

snippet.title: Nas Nas Kyu Dukhe पिया मेरी नस नस के हो दुखे || Anjali Raghav & Karan Chaudhary !! Brajbhasha Song
snippet.description:
#nasnaskyudukhei
#nasnaskyudukhe
#nasnaskyudukhei
#पिया मेरी नस नस के हो दुखे
#brajbhasha
#piyamerinasnaskyundookhei
#nasnaskyudukhisong
#nasnaskyudikhedance
#nasnaskyudukhisongdj
#balammerinasnaskyudukhei
#newbrajbhashasong
#newbrajsong
#anjaliraghav
#anjaliraghavnewsong
#anjaliraghavnasnaskyudukhe



nas nas kyu dukhei, nas nas kyu dukhe, nas nas kyu dukhei, piya meri nas nas kyu dookhei, nas nas kyu dukhi song, balam meri nas nas kyu dukhei , nas nas kyu dukhi song dj, nas nas kyu dukhi song dance, nas nas kyu dikhe song dj remix, nas nas kyu dukhe, braj bhasha song, braj songs, anjali raghav new song, anjali raghav nas nas kyu dukhe, piya meri nas nas dukhe song, nas nas kyu dukhe remix, new braj bhasha song, new brajbhasha song 2026.



Song Credits:
🎵 Song Title: Nas Nas Kyu Dukhei (नस नस क्यों दूखै)
🎭 Starring: Anjali Raghav & Diler Kharkiyay
🎤 Singers: Diler Kharkiya
📝 Lyrics: Kabir Singhora
🎼 Music: JPS Music


video credit 

ritika queen 
sharad shivhare 
Shoot with editing -patel


LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

snippet.title: GTA 5 LIVE | Train vs 100 Luxury Cars 😱🔥 कौन बचेगा?
snippet.description:
आज की इस 🔴 LIVE स्ट्रीम में हम Grand Theft Auto V के अंदर एक जबरदस्त एक्सपेरिमेंट करने वाले हैं!

🚗💥 100 लग्ज़री गाड़ियों को रेलवे ट्रैक पर खड़ा किया गया है
🚆 और सामने से आ रही है फुल स्पीड ट्रेन!

😱 क्या ये महंगी गाड़ियाँ ट्रेन को रोक पाएंगी?
या फिर सब कुछ हो जाएगा चकनाचूर?

👉 LIVE में जुड़ो और देखो कौन सी कार सबसे ज्यादा स्ट्रॉन्ग है!

🔥 Don’t forget to LIKE 👍 SHARE 📲 and SUBSCRIBE ❤️

en-US.title: GTA 5 LIVE | Train vs 100 Luxury Cars 😱🔥 Who will survive?
en-US.description:
In today's 🔴 LIVE stream, we're going to conduct an amazing experiment inside Grand Theft Auto V!

🚗💥 100 luxury cars are parked on the railway track
🚆 and a full-speed train is coming from the front!

😱 Will these expensive cars be able to stop the train?
Or will everything be destroyed?

👉 Join the LIVE and see which car is the strongest!

🔥 Don't forget to LIKE 👍 SHARE 📲 and SUBSCRIBE ❤️

🚗💥 100 लग्ज़री गाड़ियों को रेलवे ट्रैक पर खड़ा किया गया है
🚆 और सामने से आ रही है फुल स्पीड ट्रेन!

😱 क्या ये महंगी गाड़ियाँ ट्रेन को रोक पाएंगी?
या फिर सब कुछ हो जाएगा चकनाचूर?

👉 LIVE में जुड़ो और देखो कौन सी कार सबसे ज्यादा स्ट्रॉन्ग है!

🔥 Don’t forget to LIKE 👍 SHARE 📲 and SUBSCRIBE ❤️

snippet.title: Tu Tu Hai Wahi | Yeh Vaada Raha (1982) | Rishi Kapoor, Tina Munim | Kishore Kumar, Asha Bhosle Hits
snippet.description:
Relive the magic of true love with “Tu Tu Hai Wahi”, one of the most iconic romantic songs from the film Yeh Vaada Raha (1982). This timeless melody beautifully captures the feeling of rediscovering love and destiny, brought alive on screen by the charming Rishi Kapoor alongside Tina Munim and Poonam Dhillon.

🎶 Don’t forget to subscribe for more timeless hits by the legendary Kishore Kumar!  @kishorekumarhitsongs 

Tu Tu Hai Wahi | Yeh Vaada Raha (1982) | Rishi Kapoor, Tina Munim | Kishore Kumar, Asha Bhosle Hits

Song : Tu Tu Hai Wahi 
Movie : Yeh Vaada Raha (1982)
Star Cast : Rishi Kapoor, Tina Munim, Poonam Dhillon
Singer : Kishore Kumar, Asha Bhosle
Music Director : R.D Burman
Lyricist  : Gulshan Baawra

Lyrics:
la la la la la la
la la la la la la
tu tu hai wahi dil ne jise apna kaha
tu hai jaha mai hu vaha
abb toh yeh jina tere bin hai saja
o mil jaaye iss tarah do lehre jis tarah
o mil jaaye iss tarah do lehre jis tarah
phir ho naa juda ha yeh vaada raha
la la la la l la la la la l

mai aawaj hu toh tu hai git meraa
mai aawaj hu toh tu hai git meraa
jaha se niraala manmit meraa
mil jaaye iss tarah do lehre jis tarah
o mil jaaye iss tarah do lehre jis tarah
phir ho naa juda ha yeh vaada raha
tu tu hai wahi dil ne jise apna kaha
tu hai jaha mai hu vaha
abb toh yeh jina tere bin hai saja

kisi mod pe bhi naa yeh saath tute
mere haath se teraa daaman naa chhute
la la la la la la
kabhi khwaab me bhi tu mujhase naa ruthe
mere pyaar ki koyi khushiya naa lute
mil jaaye iss tarah do lehre jis tarah
mil jaaye iss tarah do lehre jis tarah
phir ho naa juda ha yeh vaada raha
tu tu hai wahi dil ne jisse apna kaha
tu hai jaha mai hu vaha
abb toh yeh jina tere bin hai saja

tujhe mai jaha ki najar se chura lu
kahi dil ke kone me tujhko chhupa lu
kabhi jindagi me pade mushkile toh
mujhe tu sambhaale tujhe mai sambhaalu
o mil jaaye iss tarah do lehre jis tarah
o mil jaaye iss tarah do lehre jis tarah
phir ho naa juda ha yeh vaada raha
tu tu hai wahi dil ne jise apna kaha
tu hai jaha mai hu vaha
abb toh yeh jina tere bin hai saja
o la la la la la la
phir ho naa juda ha yeh vaada raha
yeh vaada raha


#TuTuHaiWahi #KishoreKumar #AshaBhosle #RishiKapoor #RDBurman #OldHindiSongs #BollywoodClassics #EvergreenSongs #ClassicLoveSongs #kishorekumar #kishorekumarsongs #kishorekumarhitsongs #kishorekumarhits #evergeenhitsongs #evergeenhits #oldhindisongs #oldsongs #romantichindisongs #romanticsongs

snippet.title: Poila Boishakh Special Jukebox | Best Bengali Songs Collection | Asha Audio
snippet.description:
Poila Boishakh Special Jukebox | Best Bengali Songs Collection | Asha Audio

Celebrate the spirit of Bengali New Year with Asha Audio’s Boishakh Special Jukebox 2026 — a vibrant collection of songs that capture the essence of Poila Boishakh.

From soulful melodies to festive rhythms, this jukebox brings together some of the most loved voices and songs that define the joy, nostalgia, and celebration of Boishakh.

🎉 Turn up the volume and welcome the new year with music!

🎶Tracklist

00:00 – Achena Boishakh – Various Artists
04:01 – Makhi Roddur – Subhamita Banerjee @Subhamita99 
07:12 – Amar Kontho Hote – Jayati @JayatiChakrabortyOfficials 
12:28 – Esho Hey Boishakh – Sounak Chattopadhyay @SONGSOUNAK 
16:06 – Khushite Aaj – Shaan @SingerShaan 
20:38 – Ekla Boishakhe – Snigdhajit Bhowmick @SnigdhajitBhowmikOfficial 
23:16 – Abar Achena Boishakh – Various Artists

This special Boishakh collection blends tradition with contemporary sound, celebrating new beginnings, cultural roots, and the timeless charm of Bengali music.

🔔 Subscribe to Asha Audio for more Bengali songs
👍 Like, Share & Comment your favorite track

snippet.title: Kaash Tu Mera Na Hunda : B Praak Ft. Jyoti Nooran | Parmish Verma | Shera |In Cinemas On 15 May 2026
snippet.description:
Speed Records brings you the full video song Kaash Tu Mera Na Hunda from the upcoming Punjabi movie Shera, an emotional journey of love, regret, and the desire to bring someone back.

Featuring Parmish Verma and Sonal Chauhan, this Punjabi song beautifully portrays a husband’s heartfelt plea to his wife, a desire to fix what’s broken and relive the moments that once meant everything.

For those who connect with Punjabi sad songs, love failure songs, emotional Punjabi music, and latest Punjabi movie songs, this one will stay with you long after it ends.

Turn up the volume, feel every word, and let the story unfold. 🎶✨

#KaashTuMeraNaHunda #BPraak  #PunjabiSongs #MovieSong #PunjabiMovieSong #SadSongPunjabi #NewPunjabiSong #PunjabiMusic #JyotiNooran #JyotiNooranSong #BPraakSongs #BPraakNewSong

en.title: Kaash Tu Mera Na Hunda : B Praak Ft. Jyoti Nooran | Parmish Verma | Shera |In Cinemas On 15 May 2026
en.description:
Speed Records brings you the full video song Kaash Tu Mera Na Hunda from the upcoming Punjabi movie Shera, an emotional journey of love, regret, and the desire to bring someone back.

Featuring Parmish Verma and Sonal Chauhan, this Punjabi song beautifully portrays a husband’s heartfelt plea to his wife, a desire to fix what’s broken and relive the moments that once meant everything.

For those who connect with Punjabi sad songs, love failure songs, emotional Punjabi music, and latest Punjabi movie songs, this one will stay with you long after it ends.

Turn up the volume, feel every word, and let the story unfold. 🎶✨

#KaashTuMeraNaHunda #BPraak  #PunjabiSongs #MovieSong #PunjabiMovieSong #SadSongPunjabi #NewPunjabiSong #PunjabiMusic #JyotiNooran #JyotiNooranSong #BPraakSongs #BPraakNewSong

Lyrics:
Surmedani warga eh mera mahi
Te hor mainu ki chahida
Surmedani….
Ohdi paerr chaal suna jad jad v
Maithon bolya na janda ik vaak v
Oh v maukke di nazakat pachaan ke
Sayeon chup kar janda odon aap v
Jado akhiyan da noor howe saawein
Dupatta siron nhiyon lahida 
Surmedani warga eh mera mahi
Te hor mainu ki chahida
Surmedani….

Ohde khyalan diyan pattna te bethi nu
Haye din charde toh pai jandi shaam ni
Utton kuriyan de kaalje machaun nu
Main ohda bullan utte rakhdi aa naam ni
Jado hilda na patta kise paase
Haye odon oda geet gaida
Surmedani warga eh mera mahi
Te hor mainu ki chahida
Surmedani….

Ohde pyaran wala odan bathera eh
Mai kade mehanga leera paya koi khaas ni
Ni mainu maapeyan di yaad aun dindi na
haye odon mukhon jehri duldi mithaas ni
puri dharti de maech da hi lagge 
hun ghera wang di gulai da
Surmedani warga eh mera mahi
Te hor mainu ki chahida.   Surmedani….

Starcast: Ammy Virk, Tania, Guggu Gill, Noor Chahal, Nirmal Rishi, BN Sharma, Hobby Dhaliwal, Parkash Gadhu, Tarsem Paul, Gurpreet Bhangu, Rupinder Rupi, Seema Kaushal, Parminder Barnala, Satwant Kaur, Aakanksha  Sareen,  Verma Malik, Harman Dhaliwal, Gunveen Manchanda

Lyrics:
Surmedani warga eh mera mahi
Te hor mainu ki chahida
Surmedani….
Ohdi paerr chaal suna jad jad v
Maithon bolya na janda ik vaak v
Oh v maukke di nazakat pachaan ke
Sayeon chup kar janda odon aap v
Jado akhiyan da noor howe saawein
Dupatta siron nhiyon lahida 
Surmedani warga eh mera mahi
Te hor mainu ki chahida
Surmedani….

Ohde khyalan diyan pattna te bethi nu
Haye din charde toh pai jandi shaam ni
Utton kuriyan de kaalje machaun nu
Main ohda bullan utte rakhdi aa naam ni
Jado hilda na patta kise paase
Haye odon oda geet gaida
Surmedani warga eh mera mahi
Te hor mainu ki chahida
Surmedani….

Ohde pyaran wala odan bathera eh
Mai kade mehanga leera paya koi khaas ni
Ni mainu maapeyan di yaad aun dindi na
haye odon mukhon jehri duldi mithaas ni
puri dharti de maech da hi lagge 
hun ghera wang di gulai da
Surmedani warga eh mera mahi
Te hor mainu ki chahida.   Surmedani….

snippet.title: Franklin & Shinchan Vishu Celebration with Family 🌼❤️ GTA 5 Malayalam
snippet.description:
ഈ വിഷു സന്തോഷമായി തുടങ്ങിയത്… പക്ഷേ പിന്നെ സംഭവിച്ചത് 😳💔

Franklin, Shinchan, Michael & Trevor ചേർന്ന് ഒരു Vishu Special Shop തുടങ്ങുന്നു 🪔✨
പക്ഷേ John എന്നൊരു കള്ളൻ 💥 firecrackers മോഷ്ടിച്ച് പ്രശ്നങ്ങൾ ഉണ്ടാക്കുന്നു!

അതിനിടെ Franklin കണ്ടെത്തുന്നത്… 😨
ഒരു container ഉള്ളിൽ കുടുങ്ങിയ കുട്ടികൾ!

Franklin അവരെ രക്ഷിക്കുമോ? 🥺
Johnനെ പിടിക്കാനാകുമോ? 😡
അവസാനം Vishu celebration എങ്ങനെയാകും? 🌸

👉 Full video കാണൂ — Emotional, Comedy, Action എല്ലാം ഉള്ള ഒരു Vishu Special Story!

🔥 Don’t Forget to:
👍 Like | 💬 Comment | 🔔 Subscribe

snippet.title: Noboborsher Gaan | Pohela Baishakh Special Rabindra Sangeet | Rabindra Sangeet Jukebox
snippet.description:
Celebrate the spirit of Bengali New Year with this beautiful collection of Noboborsher Gaan (Poila Boishakh songs) featuring timeless Rabindra Sangeet 🎧🌸

Composed by Rabindranath Tagore, these songs perfectly capture the essence of renewal, joy, and cultural richness that define Poila Boishakh. From uplifting melodies to soulful compositions, this jukebox brings together some of the most cherished Tagore songs for Basanta and Noboborsho celebrations.

Whether you’re welcoming the new year, enjoying festive moments, or simply immersing yourself in Bengali heritage music, this collection offers a perfect musical companion. These songs are widely loved across YouTube for their emotional depth and seasonal relevance, making them ideal for festival playlists and suggested viewing.

Perfect for listeners who enjoy Rabindra Sangeet jukebox, Basanter gaan, Poila Boishakh songs, and Bengali cultural music, this playlist brings the joy of Noboborsho to life 🌿✨

🎶 Press play and celebrate the new beginnings with timeless Tagore melodies.

snippet.title: കൃഷ്ണ കൃഷ്ണ  മുകുന്ദ | Vishu Special Song | Vishu Song 2026 | Lyrical Video | Krishna Krishna #vishu
snippet.description:
🙏 Hare Krishna 🙏

🌼 Krishna Krishna Mukunda | Vishu Special Song 2026 | Vishu Song Malayalam 🌼

Celebrate the divine joy of Vishu 2026 with this beautiful Krishna devotional song Malayalam – Krishna Krishna Mukunda ✨🦚

Krishna Krishna Mukunda is a soulful Vishu special Malayalam song dedicated to Lord Krishna (Guruvayoorappan). This devotional song brings a divine musical experience filled with bhakti, peace, and positivity 🎶💛

Start your Vishu morning with this Krishna bhakti song Malayalam, and feel the divine presence of Lord Krishna. Receive blessings of happiness, prosperity, and success on this auspicious Vishu day 🌼✨

Let this Krishna devotional song uplift your soul and fill your heart with devotion and positive energy 🦚💙

👉 Listen now and experience the divine bliss of Krishna! 

🙏 ഹരേ കൃഷ്ണ 🙏

🌼 കൃഷ്ണ കൃഷ്ണ മുകുന്ദ | വിഷു സ്പെഷ്യൽ ഗാനം 2026 | വിഷു ഗാനങ്ങൾ മലയാളം 🌼

വിഷു 2026യുടെ ദൈവിക സന്തോഷം ഈ മനോഹരമായ കൃഷ്ണ ഭക്തിഗാനം മലയാളം – കൃഷ്ണ കൃഷ്ണ മുഖുന്ദ വഴി അനുഭവിക്കൂ ✨🦚

കൃഷ്ണ കൃഷ്ണ മുകുന്ദ ഒരു മനോഹരമായ വിഷു സ്പെഷ്യൽ മലയാളം ഗാനം ആണ്, ഭഗവാൻ കൃഷ്ണനായി (ഗുരുവായൂരപ്പൻ) സമർപ്പിച്ചിരിക്കുന്നത്. ഈ ഭക്തിഗാനം ഭക്തി, സമാധാനം, പോസിറ്റിവിറ്റി എന്നിവ നിറഞ്ഞ ദൈവിക സംഗീതാനുഭവം നൽകുന്നു 🎶💛

ഈ കൃഷ്ണ ഭക്തിഗാനം മലയാളം കൊണ്ട് നിങ്ങളുടെ വിഷു പ്രഭാതം ആരംഭിക്കൂ. ഭഗവാൻ കൃഷ്ണന്റെ ദൈവിക സാന്നിധ്യം അനുഭവിക്കുകയും സന്തോഷം, സമൃദ്ധി, വിജയം എന്നിവയുടെ അനുഗ്രഹം നേടുകയും ചെയ്യൂ 🌼✨

ഈ കൃഷ്ണ ഭക്തിഗാനം നിങ്ങളുടെ മനസ്സിനെ ഉന്നതത്തിലേക്ക് ഉയർത്തുകയും ഭക്തിയും പോസിറ്റീവ് ഊർജവും നിറയ്ക്കുകയും ചെയ്യും 🦚💙

👉 ഇപ്പോൾ കേൾക്കൂ, കൃഷ്ണഭഗവാന്റെ ദൈവികാനുഭവം അനുഭവിക്കൂ! 🙏✨

വാഴും കണ്ണൻ്റെ നാമങ്ങൾ ചൊല്ലി ഞാൻ 
അംബുജാക്ഷണ കാരുണ്യ വാരിതേ

localized.description:
🙏 Hare Krishna 🙏

🌼 Krishna Krishna Mukunda | Vishu Special Song 2026 | Vishu Song Malayalam 🌼

Celebrate the divine joy of Vishu 2026 with this beautiful Krishna devotional song Malayalam – Krishna Krishna Mukunda ✨🦚

Krishna Krishna Mukunda is a soulful Vishu special Malayalam song dedicated to Lord Krishna (Guruvayoorappan). This devotional song brings a divine musical experience filled with bhakti, peace, and positivity 🎶💛

Start your Vishu morning with this Krishna bhakti song Malayalam, and feel the divine presence of Lord Krishna. Receive blessings of happiness, prosperity, and success on this auspicious Vishu day 🌼✨

Let this Krishna devotional song uplift your soul and fill your heart with devotion and positive energy 🦚💙

👉 Listen now and experience the divine bliss of Krishna! 

🙏 ഹരേ കൃഷ്ണ 🙏

🌼 കൃഷ്ണ കൃഷ്ണ മുകുന്ദ | വിഷു സ്പെഷ്യൽ ഗാനം 2026 | വിഷു ഗാനങ്ങൾ മലയാളം 🌼

വിഷു 2026യുടെ ദൈവിക സന്തോഷം ഈ മനോഹരമായ കൃഷ്ണ ഭക്തിഗാനം മലയാളം – കൃഷ്ണ കൃഷ്ണ മുഖുന്ദ വഴി അനുഭവിക്കൂ ✨🦚

കൃഷ്ണ കൃഷ്ണ മുകുന്ദ ഒരു മനോഹരമായ വിഷു സ്പെഷ്യൽ മലയാളം ഗാനം ആണ്, ഭഗവാൻ കൃഷ്ണനായി (ഗുരുവായൂരപ്പൻ) സമർപ്പിച്ചിരിക്കുന്നത്. ഈ ഭക്തിഗാനം ഭക്തി, സമാധാനം, പോസിറ്റിവിറ്റി എന്നിവ നിറഞ്ഞ ദൈവിക സംഗീതാനുഭവം നൽകുന്നു 🎶💛

ഈ കൃഷ്ണ ഭക്തിഗാനം മലയാളം കൊണ്ട് നിങ്ങളുടെ വിഷു പ്രഭാതം ആരംഭിക്കൂ. ഭഗവാൻ കൃഷ്ണന്റെ ദൈവിക സാന്നിധ്യം അനുഭവിക്കുകയും സന്തോഷം, സമൃദ്ധി, വിജയം എന്നിവയുടെ അനുഗ്രഹം നേടുകയും ചെയ്യൂ 🌼✨

ഈ കൃഷ്ണ ഭക്തിഗാനം നിങ്ങളുടെ മനസ്സിനെ ഉന്നതത്തിലേക്ക് ഉയർത്തുകയും ഭക്തിയും പോസിറ്റീവ് ഊർജവും നിറയ്ക്കുകയും ചെയ്യും 🦚💙

👉 ഇപ്പോൾ കേൾക്കൂ, കൃഷ്ണഭഗവാന്റെ ദൈവികാനുഭവം അനുഭവിക്കൂ! 🙏✨

snippet.title: Thaari Bhabhi (Official Video) | Sumit Parta | New Haryanvi Song 2026
snippet.description:
Mahra Tora presents the official video of Thaari Bhabhi. This song is about a man who left his rough life behind for the woman he loves. He used to find thrill in fights, but now he finds peace in her words. He is no longer a man of the streets, he is a man who stands proudly beside his wife. It shows that real strength is not about fighting; it is about loyalty, love, and growing up.

snippet.title: Khal Nayak Hoon Main - Lyrical | Sanjay Dutt | Kavita Krishnamurthy | Vinod Rathod
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song: Khal Nayak Hoon Mein
Movie: Khal Nayak
Singers: Kavita Krishnamurthy, Vinod Rathod
Lyrics: Anand Bakshi
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal

Movie Credits:
Producer: Subhash Ghai
Director: Subhash Ghai
StarCast: Sanjay Dutt, Jackie Shroff, Madhuri Dixit, Raakhee, Anupam Kher

Song Lyrics:

Ji Haan 
Main Hoon Khal Nayak

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu 
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu 

Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hai Tu
Is Pyaar Ki Tujhko Kya Kadar
Is Pyaar Ke Kahan Layak Hai Tu

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main 
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main
Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hoon Main
Hai Pyaar Kya Mujhko Kya Khabar
Bas Yaar Nafrat Ke Layak Hoon Main
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main

Teri Tabiyat Toh Rangeen Hai 
Par Tu Mohabbat Ki Tauheen Hai

Kuch Bhi Nahi Yaad Iske Siwa
Na Main Kisika Na Koi Mera
Jo Cheez Maangi Nahi Woh Mili
Karta Main Kya Aur Bas Chheen Li
Bas Chheen Li
Bas Chheen Li

Main Bhi Sharafat Se Jeeta Magar
Mujhko Shareefon Se Lagta Tha Darr
Sabko Pata Tha Main Kamzor Hoon
Main Isliye Aaj Kuch Aur Hoon
Kuch Aur Hoon
Kuch Aur Hoon

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main 
Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hoon Main
Hai Pyaar Kya Mujhko Kya Khabar
Bas Yaar Nafrat Ke Layak Hoon Main
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu

Kitne Khilono Se Khela Hai Tu 
Afsos Phir Bhi Akela Hai Tu

Bachpan Mein Likhi Kahani Meri
Kaise Badalti Jawani Meri
Saara Samundar Mere Paas Hai
Ek Boond Paani Meri Pyaas Hai
Meri Pyaas Hai
Meri Pyaas Hai
Dekha Tha Maa Ne Kabhi Pyaar Se
Ab Mil Gayi Woh Bhi Sansaar Se
Main Woh Lootera Hoon Jo Lutt Gaya 
Maa Ka Bhi Aanchal Kahin Chhut Gaya

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main
Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hoon Main
Hai Pyaar Kya Mujhko Kya Khabar
Bas Yaar Nafrat Ke Layak Hoon Main

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu
Khal Nayak Hoon Main
Nayak Nahi 
Khal Nayak Hoon Main
Nayak Nahi 
Khal Nayak Hoon Main

Nayak 
Khal Nayak
Nayak 
Khal Nayak
Nayak 
Khal Nayak

snippet.title: Hanuman Jayanti Special : Birth Story of Sri Hanuman | ହନୁମାନ ଜନ୍ମ ରହସ୍ୟ ଓ କାହାଣୀ | Namita Agrawal
snippet.description:
ଜୟ ହନୁମାନ! 🙏
ହନୁମାନ ଜୟନ୍ତୀର ଏହି ପବିତ୍ର ଅବସରରେ ଶ୍ରବଣ କରନ୍ତୁ ମହାବୀର ହନୁମାନଙ୍କ ପବିତ୍ର ଜନ୍ମ କାହାଣୀ। କିପରି ହୋଇଥିଲା ପବନପୁତ୍ରଙ୍କ ଜନ୍ମ ଏବଂ କଣ ଥିଲା ଏହା ପଛର ରହସ୍ୟ, ସେହି ପୌରାଣିକ କଥାବସ୍ତୁକୁ ଅତି ସୁନ୍ଦର ଭାବେ ଉପସ୍ଥାପନା କରିଛନ୍ତି ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ପ୍ରଖ୍ୟାତ କଣ୍ଠଶିଳ୍ପୀ ନମିତା ଅଗ୍ରୱାଲ।

ଏହି ଭିଡିଓଟି ଆପଣଙ୍କୁ ଶ୍ରୀ ହନୁମାନଙ୍କ ଅସୀମ ଶକ୍ତି ଏବଂ ଭକ୍ତି ସହ ପରିଚିତ କରାଇବ। ଯଦି ଆପଣଙ୍କୁ ଏହି ଉପସ୍ଥାପନାଟି ଭଲ ଲାଗେ, ତେବେ ଭିଡିଓକୁ Like କରନ୍ତୁ ଏବଂ ନିଜ ପ୍ରିୟଜନଙ୍କ ସହ Share କରନ୍ତୁ

#HanumanJanma #NamitaAgrawal #Charanamruta #JayHanuman #HanumanJayanti #OdiaPurana #SidharthMusic #Bajrangbali #OdiaBhajan #HanumanStory #NamitaAgrawal #SitaramAgrawal
===================================
Song - Hanumana Janma Kahani
Singer - Namita Agrawal
Music - Shiba Prasad Dash, Saroj Kumar Ratha
Lyrics - Bijay Malla
Album No - 8816
Album Name - Hanumana Janma Kahani
Label - Sidharth Music
====================================

pa.title: 🔴 WWE 2K25 ਲਾਈਵ: ਹਾਰਡਕੋਰ ਮੈਚ ਅਤੇ ਮਹਾਂਕਾਵਿ ਝਗੜੇ | ਹਿੰਦੀ ਗੇਮਪਲੇ
pa.description:
ਰਿੰਗਸਾਈਡ ਪਲੇ ਵਿੱਚ ਤੁਹਾਡਾ ਸਵਾਗਤ ਹੈ! ਅੱਜ ਕੀ ਲਾਈਵ ਸਟ੍ਰੀਮ ਮੈਂ ਹਮ WWE 2K25 ਖੇਡ ਰਹੇ ਹਾਂ। ਅਗਰ ਸਟ੍ਰੀਮ ਪਸੰਦ ਆਏ ਤਾਂ ਲਾਈਕ ਕਰੋ ਅਤੇ ਸਬਸਕ੍ਰਾਈਬ ਕਰੋ ਜ਼ਰੂਰ ਕਰੋ।

റിംഗ്‌സൈഡ് പ്ലേയിലേക്ക് സ്വാഗതം! WWE 2K25 ലൈവ് സ്ട്രീം ചെയ്യാൻ സ്വാഗതം. അഗർ സ്ട്രീം പസൻഡ് ആയേ തോ ലൈക്ക് ഓർ സബ്‌സ്‌ക്രൈബ് ചെയ്യുക.

🔴 സ്ട്രീം ഹൈലൈറ്റുകൾ:

WWE 2K25 ലൈവ് ഗെയിംപ്ലേയും മത്സരങ്ങളും

ഹിന്ദി കമന്ററിയും ഇടപെടലുകളും

ഹാർഡ്‌കോർ, TLC, യൂണിവേഴ്‌സ് മോഡ് ഗെയിംപ്ലേ

സൂപ്പർചാറ്റും അംഗത്വങ്ങളും വിലമതിക്കപ്പെടുന്നു, പക്ഷേ ഒരിക്കലും ആവശ്യമില്ല!

🖥️ പിസി & സ്ട്രീം സ്പെസിഫിക്കേഷനുകൾ:

GPU: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5060

മൈക്ക്: Maono DGM20

കൺട്രോളർ: EvoFox Elite X2

ക്യാമറ: Nikon Z30 (ഫേസ്‌ക്യാം)

📌 ചാറ്റിനുള്ള നിയമങ്ങൾ:

സ്‌പാമിംഗ് ഇല്ല.

ചാറ്റിലുള്ള എല്ലാവരെയും ബഹുമാനിക്കുക.

സ്വയം പ്രമോഷൻ ഇല്ല.

#WWE2K25 #WWE2K25Live #റിംഗ്‌സൈഡ്‌പ്ലേ #WWEഹിന്ദി #WWEGameplay #ഗെയിമിംഗ്‌ലൈവ്

Fall in love with the soulful melody of Raanjhana Ve, beautifully sung by Antara Mitra and Soham Naik. This romantic Hindi song captures the essence of love, emotions, and heartfelt connection.

Enjoy the song in a high-quality lyrical video, perfect for singing along and immersing yourself in its soothing vibe.

snippet.title: Sia - Cheap Thrills ft. Sean Paul 🌟 (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Cheap Thrills by Sia featuring Sean Paul is an upbeat anthem about having fun without needing money or luxury. 🎶💃 The song celebrates dancing, freedom, and enjoying the moment with friends. Its catchy rhythm and joyful energy make it all about good vibes and living in the now. 🌟🕺

──────────────────────────────

🎤Lyrics: Sia - Cheap Thrills ft. Sean Paul

[Intro: Sean Paul]
Up with it girl
Rock with it girl
Show dem it girl (Bada bang bang)
Bounce with it girl
Dance with it girl
Get with it girl (Bada bang bang)

[Verse 1: Sia]
Come on, come on, turn the radio on
It's Friday night and I won't be long
Gotta do my hair, I put my make up on
It's Friday night and I won't be long

[Pre-Chorus: Sia (Sean Paul)]
Till I hit the dance floor (Bada bang)
Hit the dance floor (Bada bang)
I got all I need
No, I ain't got cash, I ain't got cash
But I got you baby
(Just you an me)

[Chorus: Sia & Sean Paul]
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I can feel the beat
Mek di beat jus tek control
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I keep dancing
Free up yourself, get outa control

[Verse 2: Sia]
Come on, come on, turn the radio on
It's Saturday and I won't be long
Gotta paint my nails, put my high heels on
It's Saturday and I won't be long

[Pre-Chorus: Sia (Sean Paul)]
Till I hit the dance floor (Bada bang)
Hit the dance floor (Bada bang)
I got all I need (Sia)
No, I ain't got cash, I ain't got cash
But I got you baby
(Just you an me)

[Chorus: Sia & Sean Paul]

(I love cheap thrills!)
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I can feel the beat
Mek di beat jus tek control
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I keep dancing
Free up yourself, get outa control

[Verse 3: Sean Paul & (Sia)]
Me an you, girl, you an me
Drop it to di floor an mek mi see your energy because
Mi nah play nuh hide an seek
Wah fi see di ting you have weg mek me feel weak girl (Free)
'Cause anytime you wine an kotch it
Di selector pull it up an put it pon repeat, girl
I'm nah touch a dollar in mi pocket
'Cause nuttn' in this world ain't more dan what you worth (I love cheap thrills!)

[Bridge: Sia & Sean Paul]
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I can feel the beat
Mek di beat jus tek control
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I keep dancing
Free up yourself, get outa control
Oh, oh

[Chorus: Sia & Sean Paul]
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I can feel the beat
Mek di beat jus tek control
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I keep dancing
Free up yourself, get outa control

[Outro: Sia]
La, la, la, la, la, la
(I love cheap thrills!)
La, la, la, la, la, la
(I love cheap thrills!)
La, la, la, la, la, la
(I love cheap thrills!)
La, la, la, la, la, la
(I love cheap thrills!)

snippet.title: Bhalobashar Desh(ভালবাসার দেশ)|Anirban,Subhadeep,Debraj| Subodh K |Bengali Music Video |Hooligaanism
snippet.description:
ভুলে সব দ্বেষ, চলো বানাই ভালবাসার দেশ…
শুনে নাও অনির্বাণ ভট্টাচার্যের লেখায়, শুভদীপ গুহ, দেবরাজ ভট্টাচার্য ও অনির্বাণ ভট্টাচার্যের সুরে এবং কণ্ঠে ‘হুলিগানইজম’-এর নতুন গান ‘ভালবাসার দেশ’, exclusively, @HooliGaanism  -এ। 

Let go of all hatred, let’s create a land of love…
Listen to the song ‘Bhalobashar Desh’, written by Anirban Bhattacharya, sung and composed by Shubadeep Guha, Debraj Bhattacharya, and Anirban Bhattacharya, exclusively on @HooliGaanism 

Audio Links :

Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/album/74GdWjeo3Oh24qqB0qhQeE?si=k4n7oVw7T4eH7-ZPbsUESg%0A
Youtube Music - https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=l0N_0GkVAgI&si=7l8WLGBdYbsbrosA
Amazon Music - https://music.amazon.in/albums/B0GX2CBVZS?trackAsin=B0GX28P961&do=play&ts=1776142303&ref=dm_sh_8B4GCUk0laubsUZrsVC6vLxJj&referrer=dm_sh_whatsapp
Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/in/album/bhalobashar-desh-single/1893154746?ls
Gaana - https://gaana.com/song/bhalobashar-desh

Lyrics - Anirban Bhattacharya 
Composition - Debraj Bhattacharya, Subhadeep Guha, Anirban Bhattacharya 
Arrangment - Hooligaanism

Lyrics :

আর কতদিন কথা ছুঁড়ে ছুঁড়ে মারবে অন্যকে 
আর কতদিন কত অপমানে ভাঙবে অন্যকে 
ফেল উপড়ে বিষবৃক্ষ নিজের বুকের ভিতর 
সব আঘাতের ইতিহাসে উড়িয়ে দাও মায়ার চাদর 
চলো বানাই ভালবাসার দেশ 
ভালবাসা হোক রোজকার অভ্যেস 

কত ভেঙেছে মন প্রতিশোধের আঘাতে 
কত ধ্বংসের ছায়া আজও পড়ে পথে 
তবু লড়েছে মানুষ দাঁড়িয়েছে উঠে ফেলেছে মাথার ঘাম 
নিকষ নিঝুম রাতে মায়া ভরা দুই হাতে 
বুনেছে কাঁথা লিখেছে তাতে নতুন শিশুর নাম 

সে শিশুর দুই চোখে লেখা আছে এই নির্দেশ 
চলো বানাই ভালবাসার দেশ 
ভালবাসা হোক রোজকার অভ্যেস 

একবার ভাব কোথায় এ ঘৃণার হবে শেষ 
শেষের সে দিনে দেখতে কেমন হবে তোমার দেশ 
তোমার দেশ…

#BhalobasharDesh #Hooligaanism #AnirbanBhattacharya #SubodhKerkar #NewBengaliSong #BengaliMusic #IndieMusic #AnirbanBhattacharyaSongs #HooligaanismLive #BanglaNewSong2026

localized.title: Bhalobashar Desh(ভালবাসার দেশ)|Anirban,Subhadeep,Debraj| Subodh K |Bengali Music Video |Hooligaanism
localized.description:
ভুলে সব দ্বেষ, চলো বানাই ভালবাসার দেশ…
শুনে নাও অনির্বাণ ভট্টাচার্যের লেখায়, শুভদীপ গুহ, দেবরাজ ভট্টাচার্য ও অনির্বাণ ভট্টাচার্যের সুরে এবং কণ্ঠে ‘হুলিগানইজম’-এর নতুন গান ‘ভালবাসার দেশ’, exclusively, @HooliGaanism  -এ। 

Let go of all hatred, let’s create a land of love…
Listen to the song ‘Bhalobashar Desh’, written by Anirban Bhattacharya, sung and composed by Shubadeep Guha, Debraj Bhattacharya, and Anirban Bhattacharya, exclusively on @HooliGaanism 

Audio Links :

Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/album/74GdWjeo3Oh24qqB0qhQeE?si=k4n7oVw7T4eH7-ZPbsUESg%0A

আর কতদিন কথা ছুঁড়ে ছুঁড়ে মারবে অন্যকে 
আর কতদিন কত অপমানে ভাঙবে অন্যকে 
ফেল উপড়ে বিষবৃক্ষ নিজের বুকের ভিতর 
সব আঘাতের ইতিহাসে উড়িয়ে দাও মায়ার চাদর 
চলো বানাই ভালবাসার দেশ 
ভালবাসা হোক রোজকার অভ্যেস 

কত ভেঙেছে মন প্রতিশোধের আঘাতে 
কত ধ্বংসের ছায়া আজও পড়ে পথে 
তবু লড়েছে মানুষ দাঁড়িয়েছে উঠে ফেলেছে মাথার ঘাম 
নিকষ নিঝুম রাতে মায়া ভরা দুই হাতে 
বুনেছে কাঁথা লিখেছে তাতে নতুন শিশুর নাম 

সে শিশুর দুই চোখে লেখা আছে এই নির্দেশ 
চলো বানাই ভালবাসার দেশ 
ভালবাসা হোক রোজকার অভ্যেস 

একবার ভাব কোথায় এ ঘৃণার হবে শেষ 
শেষের সে দিনে দেখতে কেমন হবে তোমার দেশ 
তোমার দেশ…

snippet.title: Top 10 Bengali Songs Of Asha Bhosle | Best of Asha Bhosle | আশা ভোঁসলে এর সেরা ১০টি বাংলা গান
snippet.description:
Step into the golden era of Bengali music with this specially curated Top 10 Bengali Songs collection of Asha Bhosle 🎧✨

One of India’s most versatile and celebrated voices, Asha Bhosle has delivered countless timeless Bangla songs that beautifully capture romance, nostalgia, and melody. This jukebox brings together her most iconic Bengali hits — songs that continue to enchant listeners across generations.

From soulful romantic tracks to melodious classics, each song in this collection reflects the richness of Bengali film and modern music. Whether you are rediscovering old favourites or exploring her Bangla repertoire for the first time, this playlist offers a perfect musical journey.

Ideal for fans of evergreen Bengali songs, retro Bangla music, romantic classics, and vintage Bollywood-Bengali crossover hits, this jukebox is perfect for relaxed listening and nostalgic moments.

🎶 Press play and relive the magic of timeless Bangla melodies.
